title: Rescue bag
abstract: The present disclosure concerns a rescue bag (1), for covering and evacuating an injured and / or hypothermic patient. In open state, the rescue bag has a taperedshape towards a lower end (A') of the rescue bag (1). The rescue bag (1) comprises an outer layer (2), an inner layer (4) and a padding layer (3). The padding layer comprises at least one insulation layer (3a) and a lining (3b), located between the outer layer (2) and the inner layer (4). The lining (3b) of the padding layer (3) is fixed to the outer layer (2). The inner layer (4) comprises a barrier layer(4a), a diffusing layer (4c) and an absorbing layer (4b), located between the barrier layer (4a) and the diffusing layer (4c); and wherein the barrier layer (4a) faces the lining (3b) of padding layer (3).
claims:
Claims CLAIMS A rescue bag (1 ), for covering and evacuating an injured and I or hypothermic patient, wherein the rescue bag, in open state, having a tapered shape towards a lower end (Aâ) of the rescue bag (1 ); the rescue bag (1 ) comprising: - an outer layer (2); - an inner layer (4); and - a padding layer (3) comprising at least one insulation layer (3a) and a lining (3b), located between the outer layer (2) and the inner layer (4); the lining (3b) of the padding layer (3) is fixed to the outer layer (2); the inner layer (4) comprising - a barrier layer (4a), - a diffusing layer (4c); and - an absorbing layer (4b), located between the barrier layer (4a) and the diffusing layer (c); and wherein the barrier layer (4a) faces the lining (3b) of the padding layer (3). The rescue bag (1 ) according to claim 1 , wherein the outer layer (2) comprises a fabric layer (2a) and a polymer coating (2b) or a polymer lining, the polymer coating (2b) or polymer lining being applied to the fabric layer (2a) and facing the padding layer (3). The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 2, wherein the outer layer (2) is water resistant, with a water resistance rating in the range 1500 mm to 10000 mm, or wherein the outer layer (2) is waterproof, with a water resistance rating of at least 10000 mm. The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 3, wherein the outside of the outer layer (2) is coated with a durable water repellent coating, such as a fluoropolymer coating. 5. The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 4, wherein, in open state, the rescue bag (1 ) having a total length of 225 cm to 325 cm, a central part (1 a) of the rescue bag (1 ) having a width of 160 cm to 220 cm and a tapered lower part (1 b) towards the lower end (Aâ) of the rescue bag (1 ) having a width of 50 cm to 110 cm . 6. The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 5, wherein the insulation layer (3a) has a weight of 100 - 450 g/m 2 . 7. The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 6, comprising a support area (1 d), configured to support at least the back of a patient, wherein one or more additional insulation layers (3a) are applied in the support area (1 d) to minimize heat loss. 8. The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 -7, wherein the barrier layer (4a) comprises a fluid tight barrier layer. 9. The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 8, wherein the absorbing layer (4b) comprises a super absorbent polymer layer, comprising a sodium acrylate based (co)polymer or a polyacrylic acid polymer, the super absorbent polymer layer preferably being in granular form. 10. The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 9, wherein the diffusing layer (4c) comprises a non-woven or a woven fabric, preferably with an open structure. 11 . The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 10, comprising an extending patch (1 c), for supporting the head of a patient, at the upper end (A) of the rescue bag (1 ). 12. The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 11 , further comprising a detachable hood. 

 17 The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 12, comprising one or more fasteners (6a) and corresponding mating parts (6b), located on the outside of the rescue bag (1 ) and configured for closing the rescue bag (1 ). The rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 13, comprising one or more carrying loops (7) located on the outside of the rescue bag (1 ) and configured for carrying the rescue bag (1 ) when wrapped around an injured and I or hypothermic patient. Use of a rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 14, to cover an injured and I or hypothermic patient located in the field, at an accident location and I or during transport to a hospital. A method for producing a rescue bag (1 ) according to any of claims 1 - 14, the method comprising: - providing an outer layer (2), a padding layer (3) and an inner layer (4); - fixing a lining (3b) of the padding layer (3) to the outer layer (2), preferably at the perimeter thereof; and - placing the inner layer (4) on the lining (3b). A method according to claim 16, wherein the lining (3b) is fixed to the outer layer (2) by sewing, by heat welding or by ultrasonic welding.
